rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TRAYLOR TRUST, DATED MAY 3, 1996, AS PURPORTEDLY AMENDED AND RESTATED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Action Against Personal Representative And For Order Substituting Personal Representative; Declaration Of James Andrade
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Michael B. McNaughton. Before the court is Motion to Continue Action Against Personal Representative and for Order Substituting Personal Representative; Declaration of James Andrade ("Motion"). On May 8, 2026, this court issued Order Granting Stipulation To Continue Action Against Personal Representative And For Substitution Of Personal Representative. The Motion is DENIED as moot. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ESTHER J. PAVLOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issue has not been cleared. (1) The issues of David Demers, the decedent's predeceased brother (Sec. 8002(a)(3)), must be identified, and notice must be provided to them (Sec. 8110(a)), even if they are not beneficiaries under this will. Although this requirement was included in the tentative ruling, petitioners have not yet provided the necessary information. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VALARIE PHYLLIS CLEMENT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/24/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) An amended pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends (CRC 7.53(a)). 2) Form DE-121 is mandatory form of notice for a petition for probate. Please address the above issues and delivery courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 06/10/26 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PRZEMYSLAW JEZIORSKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Procedural issue remaining: Form DE-121 is the mandatory judicial council form for a petition for letters of administration. Court to determine if notice to the minors is sufficient. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
